cpw_select_public.name: cpw_select_public
cpw_select_public.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM cook_profiles cp
        INNER JOIN "user" u ON u.id = cp.user_id
        WHERE cp.id = cook_pickup_windows.cook_id AND u.status = 'active'
      )

cpw_insert_own.name: cpw_insert_own
cpw_insert_own.withCheck: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

cpw_update_own.name: cpw_update_own
cpw_update_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
cpw_update_own.withCheck: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

cpw_delete_own.name: cpw_delete_own
cpw_delete_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

certs_select_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

certs_insert_own.name: certs_insert_own
certs_insert_own.withCheck:
cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
        AND status = 'pending_review'
        AND reviewed_at IS NULL
        AND reviewed_by IS NULL
        AND review_notes IS NULL

certs_delete_own_pending.name: certs_delete_own_pending
certs_delete_own_pending.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status = 'pending_review'

dish_promotions_select_public.name: dish_promotions_select_public
dish_promotions_select_public.using:
is_active = TRUE
        AND dish_id IN (SELECT id FROM dishes WHERE status = 'active')
        AND (valid_from IS NULL OR valid_from <= NOW())
        AND (valid_until IS NULL OR valid_until > NOW())
        AND (max_uses IS NULL OR uses_count < max_uses)

        AND status = 'draft'
        AND reviewed_at IS NULL

        AND review_notes IS NULL

conversations_select_cook.name: conversations_select_cook
conversations_select_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)

conversations_update_cook.name: conversations_update_cook
conversations_update_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)

messages_select_cook.name: messages_select_cook
messages_select_cook.using:
conversation_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM conversations
        WHERE cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)
      )

messages_select_client.name: messages_select_client

messages_insert_cook.name: messages_insert_cook
messages_insert_cook.withCheck:
sender_role = 'cook'
        AND conversation_id IN (
          SELECT id FROM conversations
          WHERE cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)
        )

messages_insert_client.name: messages_insert_client
messages_insert_client.withCheck:
sender_role = 'client'
        AND conversation_id IN (
          SELECT id FROM conversations WHERE client_id = auth.uid()::text
        )

messages_update_cook.name: messages_update_cook
messages_update_cook.using:
conversation_id IN (
        SELECT id FROM conversations
        WHERE cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)
      )

messages_update_client.name: messages_update_client

notif_reads_select_own.name: notif_reads_select_own
notif_reads_select_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)

notif_reads_insert_own.name: notif_reads_insert_own
notif_reads_insert_own.withCheck: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)

notif_reads_delete_own.name: notif_reads_delete_own
notif_reads_delete_own.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()::text)

order_dishes_select_client.name: order_dishes_select_client
order_dishes_select_client.using: order_id IN (SELECT id FROM orders WHERE client_id = auth.uid())

order_dishes_select_cook.name: order_dishes_select_cook
order_dishes_select_cook.using:
order_id IN (
        SELECT o.id FROM orders o
        JOIN cook_profiles cp ON o.cook_id = cp.id
        WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid()
      )

orders_select_cook.name: orders_select_cook
orders_select_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

orders_update_cook.name: orders_update_cook
orders_update_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status IN ('pending', 'confirmed', 'ready')
orders_update_cook.withCheck: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid()) AND status IN ('confirmed', 'ready', 'fulfilled', 'cancelled')

reviews_select_own.name: reviews_select_own
reviews_select_own.using: client_id = auth.uid() OR cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

reviews_insert_client.name: reviews_insert_client
reviews_insert_client.withCheck:
client_id = auth.uid()
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM orders o
          WHERE o.id = reviews.order_id
            AND o.client_id = auth.uid()
            AND o.status = 'fulfilled'
            AND o.cook_id = reviews.cook_id
        )

cook_agreements_select_own_cook.name: cook_agreements_select_own_cook
cook_agreements_select_own_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

cook_payouts_select_own_cook.name: cook_payouts_select_own_cook
cook_payouts_select_own_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

order_payments_select_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

subscriptions_select_cook.name: subscriptions_select_cook
subscriptions_select_cook.using: cook_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

tiers_select_public.name: tiers_select_public
tiers_select_public.using: listing_id IN (SELECT id FROM listings WHERE status = 'active') AND is_active = TRUE

tiers_select_own.name: tiers_select_own
tiers_select_own.using:
listing_id IN (
        SELECT l.id FROM listings l
        JOIN cook_profiles cp ON l.cook_id = cp.id
        WHERE cp.user_id = auth.uid()
      )

cook_profile_tags_insert_own.name: cook_profile_tags_insert_own
cook_profile_tags_insert_own.withCheck: cook_profile_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())

cook_profile_tags_delete_own.name: cook_profile_tags_delete_own
cook_profile_tags_delete_own.using: cook_profile_id IN (SELECT id FROM cook_profiles WHERE user_id = auth.uid())
